/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto -fno-fat-lto-objects -fuse-ld=gold -Wl,--gc-sections -shared -Wl,-soname,libactuator.so -o ../../../../lib/libactuator.so CMakeFiles/actuator.dir/pid.cc.o CMakeFiles/actuator.dir/register.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/workspace/LeapXELA_Hardware_ws/ros_ws/src/build/xela_point_cloud_representation/lib ../../../../lib/libmujoco.so.3.8.1
